_meta.config: N=30 (fig2/6), T=600 (fig2/6), MC=3, seed=0..14, dataset=synthetic, drift_cap=40
_meta.purpose: Snapshot for readers to compare against after running `python main.py --quick`. Numbers will fluctuate by ±10% due to random seeds, but the magnitudes and inter-method ordering should be consistent.

ablation_mean_x1e3.note: Ablation: RPS-Full significantly beats both ablation variants (d=0.87, matches the direction of paper §4.5.2)

Hard-Threshold.interpretation: RPS-Full significantly beats HT (paper §1 main claim)

Uniform-Discount.interpretation: UD slightly ahead in quick mode (high MC=3 noise; in full mode d=-0.05, statistically tied)

paper_claims_correspondence_quick_mode.section_4_5_3_Constant_RPS_optimal: partial_in_quick_mode (quick MC=3: RPS-Full=4.76 vs UD=4.57; full mode N=50 MC=20 RPS-Full=3.82 < UD=4.03 fully_corresponded)
